# NOD-I Revival

> Community operating stack for NOD-I hardware: Bitcoin Core, opt-in lottery
> mining, an open-source app store, a manifest SDK and a 320x240 status screen.

## Start here

- [Repository overview](README.md)
- [Architecture](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)
- [UX contract](docs/UX.md)
- [App SDK](docs/SDK.md)
- [Store governance](docs/GOVERNANCE.md)
- [Security model](docs/SECURITY.md)
- [Hardware screen](docs/HARDWARE_SCREEN.md)
- [NOD-I v1 hardware and recovery](docs/HARDWARE_NODI_V1.md)
- [Operations runbook](docs/RUNBOOK.md)
- [Agent working agreement](AGENTS.md)

## Machine-readable contracts

- [App manifest JSON Schema](packages/sdk/schema/app-manifest.schema.json)
- [Bitcoin node manifest](catalog/bitcoin-node/app.nodi.json)
- [Lottery miner manifest](catalog/lottery-miner/app.nodi.json)
- [Example community app](examples/hello-nodi/app.nodi.json)
